title: Additional Stuff 2
description: Just a random bunch of things to enhance your Minecraft experience
body:
# Additional Stuff 2

> **WARNING!** This mod is no longer being updated. It's only being reuploaded to Modrinth for legacy purposes

**Additional Stuff 2** is a random-gadgets mod which adds a few unique tools, blocks and stuff to enhance your Minecraft experience. Mod includes an in-game guide (yet unfinished) to guide yourself a bit with the items in the mod. **As of Additional Stuff 2, mod requires [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) in order to work.**

![Current items in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7ZmrFEsK/images/6fc5179fa56ab1d6f9740e85b620aca45009c4a1.png)

**Uses for most items are explained in the guidebook provided with the mod.**

## FAQ
### Can I put this mod in my modpack?
Yep, just credit me somewhere on your modpacks' page.

### Can I put this mod on my server?
Of course, but I didn't test the mod that much on multiplayer, but should work fine ;)
